module 1: create a class called coordinate that takes x and y as parameters  
class coordinate {  
  constructor(x, y) {  
    this.x = x;  
    this.y = y;  
  }  

module 2: add a method to calculate the distance from the origin  
distance() {  
  return Math.sqrt(this.x ** 2 + this.y ** 2);  
}  

module 3: add a method to check if the coordinates are equal  
equals(other) {  
  return this.x === other.x && this.y === other.y;  
}
